name: itkdev-browser-feedback
description: Browser-based visual feedback and annotation MCP server for Claude Code

hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" . && npm install --production) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"; ln -sfn "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/node_modules" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/node_modules"
